steps.title: Add the five values
steps.content: Sum the masses: $3920,3920,3640,3960,3660$, giving a total of $19100$.

steps.title: Divide by the count
steps.content: The mean is $$\tfrac{19100}{5}=3820.$$ The answer is 3820.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $3820$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $3820$.
